title: seraTek OUT OF DATE ALPHA
description: a realism/tech modpack with guns,tanks, aircraft,and the create mod
body:
yet another create modpack with the ability to explode and or work with your freinds

some light progression features and difficulty tweaks to make it harder but fair (cold sweat,hardcore darkness,noTreePunching, all tweaked to be less punishing)


we reccomend you add the following mods into it:

-your choice in lightweight shaders and any texture pack.
-simpleclouds(may cause crashes in the modpack due to graphical issues)
-minecolonies and it's compat mods with create
-twilight forest
[https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/too-many-glyphs](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/too-many-glyphs)
